title: Replace In-Memory/File Storage with Supabase-Backed Persistence
problem: Project has Prisma + Supabase but uses in-memory stores (JSON files). Data lost on restart. Supabase infrastructure is dead code.
approach: Refactor stores to use Supabase db.ts layer. Replace file reads/writes with topics.list()/topics.bulkCreate(). Create tables for tenants, themes, teams.

title: Add Real AI/LLM-Powered Content Generation
problem: Zero AI integration despite 'AI-powered' branding. Digest generator just creates HTML table. Sentiment uses keyword approach.
approach: Integrate OpenAI/Anthropic for AI-generated newsletters. Replace keyword sentiment with LLM. Use embeddings for clustering. Add LLM service abstraction.

title: Implement Actual Email Sending Pipeline
problem: Email digest generates HTML but never sends. No SMTP despite env vars. NotificationDispatcher is no-op.
approach: Integrate Resend or SendGrid. Wire to scheduler. Implement email queue with retry. Add double opt-in. Add click tracking.

title: Add Authentication to API Routes
problem: authGuard and apiKeyAuth middleware exist but never applied. All endpoints unauthenticated. Critical security gap.
approach: Apply authGuard to all /api/* routes. Add RBAC. Implement tenant-scoping. Add CORS. Write auth integration tests.

title: Add Rate Limiting and Abuse Protection
problem: No rate limiting. Vulnerable to abuse on digest generation, subscriber signup, API endpoints.
approach: Add rate limiting middleware. Limit per tenant. Use Redis for distributed rate limiting.

title: Implement Multi-Tenant Isolation
problem: No tenant isolation. One tenant's data could leak to another.
approach: Add tenant_id to all queries. Implement row-level security. Add tenant context to all service calls.

title: Add Comprehensive Test Suite
problem: No visible test coverage. Critical paths untested.
approach: Add Vitest. Write tests for critical flows: subscriber signup, digest generation, API auth.

title: Implement Webhook System for Events
problem: No webhook support. Can't trigger external actions on events.
approach: Add webhook registration. Support events: subscriber.added, digest.sent, link.clicked. Add retry logic.

title: Add Analytics Dashboard
problem: No analytics on subscriber growth, digest performance, engagement.
approach: Build analytics dashboard. Track: subscribers, open rates, click rates, top links. Visualize trends.

title: Implement Content Scheduling
problem: No scheduling. Digests sent immediately on trigger.
approach: Add scheduling system. Allow specifying send time. Implement queue for scheduled sends. Add timezone support.
